title: Thunderstorms and hail forecast for Central Karoo
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest...
bodyText: [{"type":"intro_bold","text":"Extremely high fire danger conditions are expected over Laingsburg municipality today. The expected UVB sunburn index is extreme."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest weather forecast from the South African Weather Service (SAWS), partly cloudy and warm to hot conditions are expected today, but it will be cloudy in places in the south east, with scattered to widespread showers and thundershowers possible.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest weather forecast from the South African Weather Service (SAWS), partly cloudy and warm to hot conditions are expected today, but it will be cloudy in places in the south east, with scattered to widespread showers and thundershowers possible."},{"type":"heading","text":"Impact-based warnings","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Yellow level 2 warning for severe thunderstorms leading to localised flooding and large amounts of small hail is expected over the Cape Winelands and Central Karoo Cape on Sunday, but only over the Central Karoo on Monday, 9 February.","html":"Yellow level 2 warning for severe thunderstorms leading to localised flooding and large amounts of small hail is expected over the Cape Winelands and Central Karoo Cape on Sunday, but only over the Central Karoo on Monday, 9 February."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Yellow level 4 warning for severe thunderstorms leading to flooding and large amounts of small hail is expected over the Overberg and Cape Winelands on Monday.","html":"Yellow level 4 warning for severe thunderstorms leading to flooding and large amounts of small hail is expected over the Overberg and Cape Winelands on Monday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Extremely high fire danger conditions are expected over Laingsburg municipality today.","html":"Extremely high fire danger conditions are expected over Laingsburg municipality today."},{"type":"heading","text":"Sunday 8 February:","level":"h3"}]
